scenes.text: La llave no funcionaba bien. Tenías que sacudirla, levantar el pomo de la puerta y girarla todo junto.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a young person's hand struggling with a brass key in a worn apartment door lock, hallway fluorescent lighting, paint chipping on the door frame, shallow depth of field, cinematic, 4k

scenes.text: El apartamento era minúsculo. Una ventana solo. Olor a pintura fresca y a la vida de otros.
scenes.image_prompt: Empty small apartment room, bare walls with fresh white paint, single window letting in soft afternoon light, hardwood floors, no furniture, cinematic wide angle, nostalgic mood, warm tones, 4k

scenes.text: Aún no tenía muebles. Solo un colchón en el suelo y una montena llena de todo lo que poseía.
scenes.image_prompt: A mattress on a bare floor in an empty apartment, a worn backpack leaning against the wall beside it, soft warm light from a single window, minimalist, emotional, cinematic, shallow depth of field, 4k

scenes.text: Esa primera noche, allí tumbado, miraba el techo. Nadie diciéndome que apagase las luces.
scenes.image_prompt: Low angle shot looking up at a plain white ceiling from a mattress on the floor, soft moonlight casting shadows through a bare window, peaceful solitude, cinematic lighting, intimate, 4k

scenes.text: Sólo silencio. Mi propio silencio. Y por primera vez en mi vida, me sentí completamente libre.
scenes.image_prompt: Young person lying on a mattress on the floor, eyes open staring at the ceiling, faint smile, moonlight on their face, empty apartment around them, deeply emotional, cinematic portrait, warm tones, shallow depth of field, 4k
